Hey just bought one of these. But I can't figure out how to use the electronic timer.  The instruction manual aint good :(. Is there a nice neat youtube video that can help me figure out how to use it?

I miss my old analogic oven with the mechanical timer...

items.answer: Hi Tessa.  Yes a 13 ampere plug socket will suffice and yes if you are using LPG place the tank next to the cooker or in a cabinet near the cooker.
items.question: Do I just need an electric socket to plug in for the oven and a gas tank on the side for the hobs?

title: Energy Saving Windproof Cover 6 Claw Flame Focus
detail_text: Energy-Saving Design The six-claw energy-saving stove features a unique design that enhances efficiency, reducing waste and saving you money. Six-Hole Hexagonal Design The six-hole hexagonal design of the stove allows for versatile use, accommodating various cooking pots and pans. Heat Concentration The stove's six-claw structure effectively concentrates heat, allowing for faster and more efficient cooking. Multi-functional Tool As part of the kitchen cooking utensils, this stove not only serves as a cooking tool but also as a protective cover, enhancing its practicality. Windproof Protection Equipped with a six-claw windproof hood, this stove ensures stable cooking even in windy conditions, providing a safer cooking experience.
detail_html:
Energy-Saving Design



The six-claw energy-saving stove features a unique design that enhances efficiency, reducing waste and saving you money.






Six-Hole Hexagonal Design



The six-hole hexagonal design of the stove allows for versatile use, accommodating various cooking pots and pans.






Heat Concentration



The stove's six-claw structure effectively concentrates heat, allowing for faster and more efficient cooking.






Multi-functional Tool



As part of the kitchen cooking utensils, this stove not only serves as a cooking tool but also as a protective cover, enhancing its practicality.






Windproof Protection



Equipped with a six-claw windproof hood, this stove ensures stable cooking even in windy conditions, providing a safer cooking experience.

detail_text: Color: Silver Type: Steamer Rack Material: Stainless Steel Brand New And High Quality Diameter: 22/24/26/28/30/32/34/36/38/40cm(8.66/9.45/10.2/11.02/11.8/12.6/13.39/14.17/15/15.7in) Shape: Round Thickness: 0.3cm(0.12in) Package Includes: 1*Stainless Steel Steamer Rack Feature: 1.Strong and : Made of 304 stainless steel material, this steamer tray is highly resistant to heat and ensures long-lasting durability. It won't scratch or warp, making it perfect for everyday use. 2.Fast and Even Heating: The steamer tray features evenly distributed holes, allowing for quick and efficient heating. Your food will be perfectly cooked every time. 3.Easy to Clean: With its smooth and edges, this steamer tray is easy to clean and won't scratch your hands or the dishwasher. Spend less time cleaning up and more time enjoying your meal. 4.Versatile and Compatible: Designed to fit various pressure cookers, stockpots, pans, and other cookware with a suitable diameter. It is for cooking toast, bread, salad, baking, and more. 5.Perfect Fit: Before purchasing, please ensure to measure your pressure cookercanner to ensure a perfect fit. This steamer tray is a practical and convenient addition to your kitchen arsenal. Tips: 1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference. 2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding!

Color: Silver

Brand New And High Quality

Diameter: 22/24/26/28/30/32/34/36/38/40cm(8.66/9.45/10.2/11.02/11.8/12.6/13.39/14.17/15/15.7in)

Feature:

1.Strong and : Made of 304 stainless steel material, this steamer tray is highly resistant to heat and ensures long-lasting durability. It won't scratch or warp, making it perfect for everyday use.

2.Fast and Even Heating: The steamer tray features evenly distributed holes, allowing for quick and efficient heating. Your food will be perfectly cooked every time.

3.Easy to Clean: With its smooth and edges, this steamer tray is easy to clean and won't scratch your hands or the dishwasher. Spend less time cleaning up and more time enjoying your meal.

4.Versatile and Compatible: Designed to fit various pressure cookers, stockpots, pans, and other cookware with a suitable diameter. It is for cooking toast, bread, salad, baking, and more.

5.Perfect Fit: Before purchasing, please ensure to measure your pressure cookercanner to ensure a perfect fit. This steamer tray is a practical and convenient addition to your kitchen arsenal.

Tips:

1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference.

2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding!

product.desc:
Color: Silver

Type: Steamer Rack

Material: Stainless Steel

Brand New And High Quality

Diameter: 22/24/26/28/30/32/34/36/38/40cm(8.66/9.45/10.2/11.02/11.8/12.6/13.39/14.17/15/15.7in)

Shape: Round

Thickness: 0.3cm(0.12in)


Package Includes: 1*Stainless Steel Steamer Rack

Feature:

1.Strong and : Made of 304 stainless steel material, this steamer tray is highly resistant to heat and ensures long-lasting durability. It won't scratch or warp, making it perfect for everyday use.

2.Fast and Even Heating: The steamer tray features evenly distributed holes, allowing for quick and efficient heating. Your food will be perfectly cooked every time.

3.Easy to Clean: With its smooth and edges, this steamer tray is easy to clean and won't scratch your hands or the dishwasher. Spend less time cleaning up and more time enjoying your meal.

4.Versatile and Compatible: Designed to fit various pressure cookers, stockpots, pans, and other cookware with a suitable diameter. It is for cooking toast, bread, salad, baking, and more.

5.Perfect Fit: Before purchasing, please ensure to measure your pressure cookercanner to ensure a perfect fit. This steamer tray is a practical and convenient addition to your kitchen arsenal.

Tips:

1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference.

2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding!

detail_text: Dimensions: 320x260x9mm(12.60x10.24x0.35in) Package content:1pc Range Hood Filter Screen Color: Silver Type:Range Hood Filter Material: aluminum Features: Hood filter fits most leading brands of range hoods/range hood vents. 5 layers of aluminized grease ensures better filtration and helps your range hood maintain its peak performance. Remove the old range hood filter, find the interface of the clean filter, and install it after confirming that the interface is consistent. To maintain the best performance of the cooker hood, please keep the air circulation and remove the odor. It is recommended to replace the metal oil filter of the range hood every 3-6 months.
detail_html:
Dimensions: 320x260x9mm(12.60x10.24x0.35in)

Package content:1pc Range Hood Filter Screen

Color: Silver

Type:Range Hood Filter

Material: aluminum


Features:

Hood filter fits most leading brands of range hoods/range hood vents.

5 layers of aluminized grease ensures better filtration and helps your range hood maintain its peak performance.

Remove the old range hood filter, find the interface of the clean filter, and install it after confirming that the interface is consistent.

To maintain the best performance of the cooker hood, please keep the air circulation and remove the odor. It is recommended to replace the metal oil filter of the range hood every 3-6 months.

title: DXSFV Ventilation Cooker Hood Mesh Filter Oil-proof Aluminum Mesh Kitchen Extractor Fan Filter Grease Filter Detachable Range Hood Dust Filter Kitchen
detail_text: Size: 32x26x1cm(12.6x10.24x0.39in) Color: Silver Features:Grease Filter, washable, Easy to install Package includes:1pcs Range Hood Filter Material:Aluminium Compatible devices:Cooker Hood Hood filter fits most leading brands of range hoods/range hood vents. 5 layers of aluminized grease ensures better filtration and helps your range hood maintain its peak performance. Remove the old range hood filter, find the interface of the clean filter, and install it after confirming that the interface is consistent. To maintain the best performance of the cooker hood, please keep the air circulation and remove the odor.It is recommended to replace the metal oil filter of the range hood every 3-6 months.
detail_html:
Size: 32x26x1cm(12.6x10.24x0.39in)

Color: Silver

Features:Grease Filter, washable, Easy to install

Package includes:1pcs Range Hood Filter

Material:Aluminium

Compatible devices:Cooker Hood

Hood filter fits most leading brands of range hoods/range hood vents.

5 layers of aluminized grease ensures better filtration and helps your range hood maintain its peak performance.

Remove the old range hood filter, find the interface of the clean filter, and install it after confirming that the interface is consistent.

To maintain the best performance of the cooker hood, please keep the air circulation and remove the odor.It is recommended to replace the metal oil filter of the range hood every 3-6 months.

Brand new and high quality

Mount Hole Dia: 8mm / 0.31"

Name: Gas Stove Cooker Control Knob

Size: 4.3 x 2.2cm / 1.8" x 0.8"(D*H)

Quantity: 1/2/5pcs

Color: Black


Features:

- Users only need to rotate the button to adjust the firepower of the gas stove, which is convenient and fast.

- These black plastic Control Knobs are great for you to replace the damaged ones for your Gas Stove Cooker.

- Built-in a hole for easy moung, rotary switch.

- Gas stove knobs made of high-quality plastics, scratch-resistant and durable.

2. Please allow slight manual measurement deviation for the data. Thank for your understanding.

3. 1cm=0.39''.

1/2/5x Gas Stove Cooker Control Knobs
